mapper.update: MERGE INTO FWK_WORK_LIST T USING (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL) S ON ( T.WORK_ID = #{workId} AND T.WORK_DATA_PK = #{workDataPk} AND T.GROUP_ID LIKE #{userId} || '%' AND LENGTH(#{userId}) + 3 = LENGTH(T.GROUP_ID) ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.WORK_NAME = #{workName}, T.CRUD_TYPE = #{crudType}, T.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), T.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{userId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( WORK_SEQ, WORK_ID, WORK_DATA_PK, WORK_NAME, CRUD_TYPE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, DIST_YN, GROUP_ID, FIRST_INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(WORK_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM FWK_WORK_LIST), #{workId}, #{workDataPk}, #{workName}, #{crudType}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userId}, 'N', #{userId} || '001', #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT WORK_SEQ, WORK_ID AS WORK_ORI_ID, WORK_DATA_PK, FILE_NAME FROM FWK_WORK_LIST WHERE WORK_SEQ = #{workSeq}
